pi_items.source: task.json description ('You are a digital content manager at a publishing organization') and setup_task.sh which creates Editorial Standards document with 'Review Editor: Digital Content Manager'
task.json description mentions 'publishing organization'; setup_task.sh Editorial Standards document references 'publication cycle', 'publication queue', 'layout team', and 'Q4 editorial calendar'

Task description and setup_task.sh: (1) metadata_editing - task requires updating dc:source, dc:rights, dc:language fields; (2) tags - task requires applying 'ready-for-review' and 'needs-revision' tags; (3) collections - task requires creating 'Q4 2025 Publications' collection and adding documents; (4) note_creation - task requires creating editorial assessment Note documents

task.json description references 'An Editorial Standards and Publication Guidelines note'; setup_task.sh creates a Note document at lines 146-160 with dc:title='Editorial Standards and Publication Guidelines'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires an agent to act as a Digital Content Manager in a Media/Publishing industry context. The task operates on four synthetic documents created via the Nuxeo REST API and requires the agent to: (1) edit metadata fields (dc:source, dc:rights, dc:language) to meet publication standards, (2) apply 'ready-for-review' or 'needs-revision' tags based on metadata completeness, (3) create a 'Q4 2025 Publications' collection and populate it with ready-for-review documents, and (4) create editorial assessment Note documents evaluating each article's publication readiness. All metadata claims in task.json have been independently verified against the task setup scripts and task description.
